title: Frontend Batch 13 - Public Metadata and Server Route Fallback Reinforcement
summary: Reinforced public blog/work metadata generation and shared SEO metadata safety for malformed route slugs, fetch failures, canonical paths, social images, and Work YouTube thumbnails.
behaviorBugsFound: Blog/work generateMetadata could throw URIError for malformed route slug encodings.
Blog/work generateMetadata could throw raw fetch errors during metadata generation.
Blog/work canonical metadata paths could include raw unsafe-looking slug text.
createPublicMetadata could emit protocol-relative canonical paths.
createPublicMetadata could emit unsafe javascript or protocol-relative social image URLs.
Work detail metadata could build YouTube thumbnail URLs from full YouTube URLs instead of normalized video IDs.

validation.command: npx skills find nextjs metadata testing
validation.notes: Low-install external skills found; no new skill installed.

validation.result: failed before fixes, passed after fixes

validation.notes: Isolation check after an interrupted full run; 1 file, 18 tests.

remainingGaps: Public list/card date formatting remains component-local.
Blog/work generateStaticParams malformed slug filtering is not covered.
Public page/contact/introduction metadata is less explicit than blog/work detail metadata.
recommendation: Proceed to Frontend Batch 14 - Public Static Route and Date Display Reinforcement.
